title: Google Sheets OAuth2 redirect URI mismatch error
symptom: When attempting to connect to Google Sheets via OAuth2, the user encounters a 'redirect_uri_mismatch' error message.
not_this_if: Using a self-hosted instance with manual credential entry
root_cause: The 'redirect_uri_mismatch' error occurs when the redirect URI specified in the Google API console does not match the URI that n8n is using to authenticate. This can happen due to a bug in earlier versions of n8n that has since been resolved.
fix_steps: Upgrade your n8n instance to version 2.1.4 from the admin panel.
Retry connecting to Google Sheets using OAuth2.
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 2.1.4 and attempt to connect to Google Sheets again.
